title: TechBlock - Sky
description: A SkyBlock modpack on 1.7.10 that is based on mod ExNihilo. This modpack offers many changed recipes and many quests that will help you progress.
body:
[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a3d826d24fdddf29427455ac46b78607695c34d.png)](https://bedrockhost.pl/?utm_source=techblock-pl&utm_medium=url&utm_campaign=modrinth)

Click banner above to create your own server on this modpack

This modpack is based on ExNihilo and technical mods with many changed recipes that will make your game a little bit harder. Keep in mind that you have quests that will help you progress in the game. You can really have a great time thanks to our own server that you can join with this modpack.

**Website:** https://techblock.pl
